case_title: WILLIAM BAIRES VS. FARINA FOCACCIA CUCINA ITALIANA, LLC, A FORFEITED

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAIRES, WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT FARINA FOCACCIA CUCINA ITALIANA, LLC,  A FORFEITED DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
